underlying_goal: Consolidate a 5-page web UI into 2 pages for a recruitment assistant app, then iteratively refine it with real-time progress logs, status hints, and code quality improvements
friction_detail: Server launch script failed once due to sleep/open interaction, and the auth status API didn't auto-connect to Chrome requiring a code fix to make status detection work properly.
brief_summary: User wanted to consolidate a 5-page web UI into 2 pages with iterative refinements (progress logs, status hints, auto-connect), and all changes were successfully implemented, reviewed, and pushed.
